name: Offline
description: A status of a release that shows when the game was offline for a specific platform and region.

name: Full Release
description: A status of release where the game has gone gold. Typically this is referred to as 1.0.

name: Beta
description: A status of a release where all major milestones have been met.  Typically this release is used for finding bugs and lacks optimization.

name: Alpha
description: A status of a release where milestones have been met and the game is in a playable state.

name: Cancelled
description: A status of a release that shows when the game was cancelled for a specific platform and region.

name: Early Access
description: A status of a release where the game is usually available publicly for testing.  Early access is used to get player feedback before a full release.

name: Advanced Access
description: This status reflects the availability of the game to players that have pre-ordered or purchased a specific edition.

name: Digital Compatibility Release
description: This status would apply to digitally purchasable games from the previous console of the same family with no notable changes or enhancements to them.

name: Next-Gen Optimization Patch Release
description: This status would apply to games that received a patch to perform better on next-generation hardware without getting a native release.
